lines.speaker: Meztlan
lines.text: Oh... Nilsal. Unusual to see someone up here. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do around here?

lines.speaker: Meztlan
lines.text: I used to work downstairs... but I started using the lab after hours for my own projects and the supervisor found out. Now I've been assigned to rooftop duty to look after the plants.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry to hear that. At least the view is good!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any tips for potion production?

lines.speaker: Meztlan
lines.text: I do, but only for fellow members of the Alchemical Society. Perhaps you should join up if you're interested in Herblore.

lines.speaker: Meztlan
lines.text: Yes... Make good use of the digweed once they're ready to pick. Choose which potion you use it on wisely!

lines.speaker: Meztlan
lines.text: Oh, and the processing tables can be sped up a bit if you use them correctly. You might need to do some experimenting to figure that out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks! I'd better be going now.
